message:
feat(ci): Add comprehensive CI/CD workflows with Rust and Python checks

Replace the single quality.yml workflow with two dedicated workflows:

## ci.yml - Continuous Integration
- Add Rust formatting check (cargo fmt --check)
- Add Rust linting with Clippy (-D warnings for strict checks)
- Add Rust unit tests
- Preserve existing Python quality gate with UBS integration
- Add maturin wheel build verification
- Add integration tests with pytest
- Implement proper caching for cargo registry and build artifacts
- Run on PRs and pushes to main/master

## release.yml - Cross-Platform Release Pipeline
- Build wheels for 5 platforms:
  - Linux x86_64 (ubuntu-latest)
  - Linux aarch64 (cross-compiled)
  - macOS x86_64 Intel (macos-13)
  - macOS aarch64 Apple Silicon (macos-14)
  - Windows x86_64 (windows-latest)
- Build source distribution (sdist)
- Generate SHA256 and SHA512 checksums for all artifacts
- Create GitHub releases with auto-generated release notes
- Support for pre-release tags (-rc, -beta, -alpha)
- Optional PyPI publishing with environment protection
- Trigger on version tags (v*) or manual workflow dispatch

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,198 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  pull_request:
+  push:
+    branches: [main, master]
+
+env:
+  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+  RUST_BACKTRACE: 1
+
+jobs:
+  # ============================================================
+  # Rust Quality Checks
+  # ============================================================
+  rust-fmt:
+    name: Rust Format
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Rust toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-action@stable
+        with:
+          components: rustfmt
+
+      - name: Check formatting
+        run: cargo fmt --manifest-path rust_src/Cargo.toml --all -- --check
+
+  rust-clippy:
+    name: Rust Clippy
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Rust toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-action@stable
+        with:
+          components: clippy
+
+      - name: Cache cargo registry and build
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/.cargo/registry
+            ~/.cargo/git
+            target
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-clippy-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-clippy-
+
+      - name: Run Clippy
+        run: cargo clippy --manifest-path rust_src/Cargo.toml --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
+
+  rust-test:
+    name: Rust Tests
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Rust toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-action@stable
+
+      - name: Cache cargo registry and build
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/.cargo/registry
+            ~/.cargo/git
+            target
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-test-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-test-
+
+      - name: Run tests
+        run: cargo test --manifest-path rust_src/Cargo.toml --all-features
+
+  # ============================================================
+  # Python Quality Checks
+  # ============================================================
+  python-quality:
+    name: Python Quality
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          fetch-depth: 0
+
+      - name: Install uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v3
+        with:
+          python-version-file: .python-version
+
+      - name: Sync dependencies (cpu)
+        run: uv sync --extra cpu --dev
+
+      - name: Install UBS
+        run: |
+          curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scanner/main/install.sh | bash
+          echo "$HOME/.local/bin" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"
+
+      - name: Determine diff base
+        id: diff
+        run: |
+          if [ "${{ github.event_name }}" = "pull_request" ]; then
+            echo "base=${{ github.event.pull_request.base.sha }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          else
+            echo "base=${{ github.event.before }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          fi
+
+      - name: Quality gate (changed files)
+        run: |
+          BASE="${{ steps.diff.outputs.base }}"
+          if [ -z "$BASE" ] || [ "$BASE" = "0000000000000000000000000000000000000000" ]; then
+            echo "No usable base sha; running gate on whole repo."
+            uv run python -m scripts.quality_gate --mode all
+          else
+            uv run python -m scripts.quality_gate --mode branch --base "$BASE" --head "${{ github.sha }}"
+          fi
+
+  # ============================================================
+  # Build Verification (Maturin)
+  # ============================================================
+  build-wheel:
+    name: Build Wheel
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [rust-fmt, rust-clippy]
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Rust toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-action@stable
+
+      - name: Install uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v3
+        with:
+          python-version-file: .python-version
+
+      - name: Cache cargo registry and build
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/.cargo/registry
+            ~/.cargo/git
+            target
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-build-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-build-
+
+      - name: Build wheel with maturin
+        run: |
+          uv sync --extra cpu --dev
+          uv run maturin build --release
+
+      - name: Upload wheel artifact
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: wheel-linux-x86_64
+          path: target/wheels/*.whl
+          retention-days: 7
+
+  # ============================================================
+  # Integration Tests
+  # ============================================================
+  integration-tests:
+    name: Integration Tests
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [build-wheel, python-quality]
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Rust toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-action@stable
+
+      - name: Install uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v3
+        with:
+          python-version-file: .python-version
+
+      - name: Cache cargo registry and build
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/.cargo/registry
+            ~/.cargo/git
+            target
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-test-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-test-
+
+      - name: Install dependencies and build extension
+        run: |
+          uv sync --extra cpu --dev
+          uv run maturin develop --release
+
+      - name: Run pytest
+        run: uv run pytest -v -m "not slow"

@@ -0,0 +1,210 @@
+name: Release
+
+on:
+  push:
+    tags:
+      - "v*"
+  workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      tag:
+        description: "Release tag (e.g., v0.1.0)"
+        required: true
+        type: string
+
+env:
+  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+  PACKAGE_NAME: rustbpe
+
+permissions:
+  contents: write
+
+jobs:
+  # ============================================================
+  # Build Wheels for Multiple Platforms
+  # ============================================================
+  build-wheels:
+    name: Build wheels (${{ matrix.os }} - ${{ matrix.target }})
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        include:
+          # Linux x86_64
+          - os: ubuntu-latest
+            target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
+            artifact-name: linux-x86_64
+          # Linux aarch64
+          - os: ubuntu-latest
+            target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
+            artifact-name: linux-aarch64
+          # macOS x86_64 (Intel)
+          - os: macos-13
+            target: x86_64-apple-darwin
+            artifact-name: macos-x86_64
+          # macOS aarch64 (Apple Silicon)
+          - os: macos-14
+            target: aarch64-apple-darwin
+            artifact-name: macos-aarch64
+          # Windows x86_64
+          - os: windows-latest
+            target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
+            artifact-name: windows-x86_64
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Rust toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-action@stable
+        with:
+          targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
+
+      - name: Install uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v3
+        with:
+          python-version-file: .python-version
+
+      # Linux aarch64 cross-compilation setup
+      - name: Install cross-compilation tools (Linux aarch64)
+        if: matrix.target == 'aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu'
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get update
+          sudo apt-get install -y gcc-aarch64-linux-gnu g++-aarch64-linux-gnu
+
+      - name: Set cross-compilation env (Linux aarch64)
+        if: matrix.target == 'aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu'
+        run: |
+          echo "CARGO_TARGET_AARCH64_UNKNOWN_LINUX_GNU_LINKER=aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"
+          echo "CC_aarch64_unknown_linux_gnu=aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"
+          echo "CXX_aarch64_unknown_linux_gnu=aarch64-linux-gnu-g++" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"
+
+      - name: Cache cargo registry and build
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/.cargo/registry
+            ~/.cargo/git
+            target
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.target }}-cargo-release-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.target }}-cargo-release-
+
+      - name: Build wheel with maturin
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          uv sync --extra cpu --dev
+          uv run maturin build --release --target ${{ matrix.target }}
+
+      - name: Upload wheel artifact
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: wheel-${{ matrix.artifact-name }}
+          path: target/wheels/*.whl
+          retention-days: 7
+
+  # ============================================================
+  # Build Source Distribution
+  # ============================================================
+  build-sdist:
+    name: Build source distribution
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v3
+        with:
+          python-version-file: .python-version
+
+      - name: Build sdist
+        run: |
+          uv sync --extra cpu --dev
+          uv run maturin sdist
+
+      - name: Upload sdist artifact
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: sdist
+          path: target/wheels/*.tar.gz
+          retention-days: 7
+
+  # ============================================================
+  # Create Release with Checksums
+  # ============================================================
+  release:
+    name: Create Release
+    needs: [build-wheels, build-sdist]
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Download all artifacts
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          path: dist
+          merge-multiple: true
+
+      - name: List artifacts
+        run: ls -la dist/
+
+      - name: Generate checksums
+        run: |
+          cd dist
+          sha256sum * > SHA256SUMS.txt
+          sha512sum * > SHA512SUMS.txt
+          echo "=== SHA256 Checksums ==="
+          cat SHA256SUMS.txt
+          echo ""
+          echo "=== SHA512 Checksums ==="
+          cat SHA512SUMS.txt
+
+      - name: Determine release tag
+        id: tag
+        run: |
+          if [ "${{ github.event_name }}" = "workflow_dispatch" ]; then
+            echo "tag=${{ github.event.inputs.tag }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          else
+            echo "tag=${{ github.ref_name }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          fi
+
+      - name: Create GitHub Release
+        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
+        with:
+          tag_name: ${{ steps.tag.outputs.tag }}
+          name: Release ${{ steps.tag.outputs.tag }}
+          draft: false
+          prerelease: ${{ contains(steps.tag.outputs.tag, '-rc') || contains(steps.tag.outputs.tag, '-beta') || contains(steps.tag.outputs.tag, '-alpha') }}
+          generate_release_notes: true
+          files: |
+            dist/*.whl
+            dist/*.tar.gz
+            dist/SHA256SUMS.txt
+            dist/SHA512SUMS.txt
+        env:
+          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+
+  # ============================================================
+  # Publish to PyPI (optional, requires PYPI_API_TOKEN secret)
+  # ============================================================
+  publish-pypi:
+    name: Publish to PyPI
+    needs: [release]
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v') && !contains(github.ref, '-rc') && !contains(github.ref, '-beta') && !contains(github.ref, '-alpha')
+    environment:
+      name: pypi
+      url: https://pypi.org/project/${{ env.PACKAGE_NAME }}
+    steps:
+      - name: Download all artifacts
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          path: dist
+          merge-multiple: true
+
+      - name: Remove checksum files
+        run: rm -f dist/SHA*.txt
+
+      - name: Publish to PyPI
+        uses: pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish@release/v1
+        with:
+          password: ${{ secrets.PYPI_API_TOKEN }}
+          skip-existing: true
